title: Boat Rental in Mumbai Harbour: 2026 Budget Guide
html:
Mumbai Harbour offers an affordable escape from the city, with boat rentals starting from 5,000 INR for a shared tour departing from the Gateway of India. BoatHire24 connects you with verified operators for a stress-free booking.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Mumbai Harbour?

Renting a boat in Mumbai Harbour costs between 5,000 INR and 250,000 INR depending on the vessel and duration. Shared tours start at 5,000 INR per person for a two-hour trip, while a private speedboat for half a day costs around 20,000 INR. A crewed luxury yacht like the Mefasa 90 can exceed 150,000 INR for a full day. You can compare verified boat listings and compare prices on the yacht charter in Mumbai Harbour page. You can yacht charter in Mumbai Harbour for your chosen dates.

Where to set off in Mumbai Harbour

Most boat rental trips begin from the Gateway of India, with additional departure points at Ferry Wharf, Sassoon Docks in Colaba, and the marina at Mandwa Jetty. Popular destinations include Elephanta Island, Butcher Island, and the anchorage near Haji Ali Point. The harbour stretches 10 nautical miles from the Gateway of India to Elephanta Caves, offering sheltered waters ideal for novice sailors. One option worth a look is the Mefasa 90 charter page.

Which boat to rent

  1. Sit-in speedboat best for quick transfers to Mandwa or Elephanta; carries 6, 8 passengers; from 15,000 INR for a half-day.
  2. Semi-displacement motor yacht (e.g., Azimut 50) for coastal cruising and sunset trips; up to 12 guests; from 80,000 INR for four hours.
  3. Catamaran (e.g., Lagoon 380) spacious for parties or day trips; capacity 15; from 90,000 INR for a full day.
  4. Luxury motor yacht (e.g., Mefasa 90) for corporate events or celebrations; accommodates 20; from 150,000 INR per day; see the Mefasa 90 charter page for details.

Cost breakdown for boat rental in Mumbai Harbour

  • Shared tour (2 hours): 5,000, 10,000 INR per person, includes guide and refreshments.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): 15,000, 25,000 INR for up to 6 people.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): 90,000, 150,000 INR for up to 20 guests.
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day: 150,000, 300,000 INR, includes captain, crew, and catering.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Mumbai Harbour?

No, you do not need a licence to rent a crewed boat in Mumbai Harbour. Indian maritime law requires a licence only for operating a boat above 20 metres or in commercial service without a crew. For bareboat charters, the operator will confirm exact requirements. The high season runs from November to March, when the north-east monsoon brings calm seas. A local tip: book early for December to avoid last-minute price surges. If you own a boat, you can become a host and earn from spare days.

For the best experience, choose a morning departure from Gateway of India to avoid the afternoon sea breeze, which picks up around 2 pm and can make the harbour choppy.

At a glance

  • Price band: 5,000, 300,000 INR
  • Peak months: November to March
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Capacity: 6 to 20 guests
  • Currency: Indian Rupees (INR)
  • Boat types: Speedboats, motor yachts, catamarans

Questions about boat rental in Mumbai Harbour

Can I rent a boat for a sunset cruise in Mumbai Harbour?

Yes, sunset cruises are popular and typically last 2 to 3 hours, departing around 4.30 pm from Gateway of India.

Are food and drinks included in the rental cost?

Most crewed charters include basic refreshments, but full catering is an extra cost that you can arrange with the operator.

What is the best time of year to rent a boat in Mumbai Harbour?

The best period is from November to March, when the weather is dry and the seas are calm, with average temperatures around 28°C.

Can I take a boat from Mumbai Harbour to Elephanta Caves?

Yes, Elephanta Island is a common destination, located about 10 nautical miles from the Gateway of India, and a round trip takes roughly 4 hours including a 1-hour stop.

If you own a boat in Mumbai Harbour, you can reach thousands of renters by choosing to become a host. Whether you are exploring for a day or earning from your vessel, the platform simplifies the process. BoatHire24 is a trusted name for verified charters.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Mumbai Harbour and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
